CommunityApplications.Profile:
Self-hosted tooling for running Factorio dedicated servers.
**Factorio Tools Manager** runs many Factorio servers on one host from a single web UI — creation wizard with a pre-flight test boot, live RCON console and container logs, saves and scheduled backups, mods and shared modpacks, map-generation settings with per-planet previews, whitelists, and a per-server Factorio version. Each server runs as its own container, so games keep running across a manager update.
It can also give every server its own subdomain with no port number to type, using Cloudflare DNS SRV records and a built-in DDNS job — optional, and configured in the app rather than in the container template.
Issues and questions: https://github.com/BrennanWoodbury/factorio-tools-manager/issues
